subject: Horsea, a small aquatic dragon Pokémon, swimming at the ocean surface with a coastal backdrop
description: A small seahorse-like creature swims at the surface of a bright, sparkling ocean. Its body is compact and rounded with a curled tail and small dorsal spines. The creature is primarily blue, blending naturally into the surrounding water. It is encircled by a loop of water spray — a curving arc of splashing water that frames the creature in motion. Behind it, rocky sea stacks rise from the water under a bright blue sky with white clouds. The whole image has a vivid, energetic quality with sunlit water catching highlights. The color palette is dominated by blues and aquas with white spray and light-green on the creature's fin area.
foreground: Horsea surrounded by arc of water spray, blue seahorse body
background: Open ocean with rocky sea stacks, bright sky and clouds
emotion: dynamic, energetic — creature in active motion surrounded by splash
